description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style axe featuring a matte black finish and a robust, angular blade. The blade has a distinctive double-edged design, with one side forming a broad, curved cutting edge and the other side featuring a pointed, hooked section. The handle is straight with a textured, grippy surface, likely made from a synthetic or wrapped material for enhanced handling. The overall silhouette is aggressive and functional, with the blade and handle seamlessly integrated, suggesting a full-tang construction. There are no visible decorative engravings or markings, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The axe is compact, suitable for one-handed use, and appears designed for both cutting and breaching tasks.
description: A compact, modern tactical axe with a matte black double-edged blade and a textured, straight handle. The design is aggressive and utilitarian, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the broad, curved blade and the hooked rear edge, as well as the textured handle.
description_view_1: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the axe's slimness.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, mirroring view 0, again showing the blade's geometry and the handle's grip texture.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, displaying the thinness of the axe from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, synthetic polymer handle with a textured, grippy surface and rectangular cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, angular blade with a broad curved cutting edge and a pointed, hooked rear; no beard or poll, matte black finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, full-tang construction with the blade and handle integrated as a single piece.
